enrichment.short_description: CaptivateIQ automates sales commission calculations and incentive compensation management for finance and RevOps teams.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: CaptivateIQ automates commission calculations, sales planning, and incentive compensation with a no-code plan builder and real-time analytics.

features.title: SmartGrid calculation engine
features.description: Processes data from multiple source systems in real time to run accurate, auditable commission calculations.

features.title: No-code plan builder
features.description: Logic-based workbooks let compensation and RevOps teams modify commission plans without engineering support.

features.title: Sales planning
features.description: Supports capacity planning, quota setting, and territory management alongside commission calculation.

features.title: Predictive modeling
features.description: Uses machine learning to forecast payouts and flag anomalies before they reach payroll.

features.title: Real-time reporting
features.description: Dashboards give sales, finance, and rep-level visibility into performance trends and payouts.

pros: No-code workbook builder reduces reliance on engineering for plan changes
Real-time commission calculation and payout transparency for reps
Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Sales Performance Management
Connects to common CRM, ERP, and HCM systems including Salesforce and NetSuite
cons: Pricing is custom and not published, requiring a sales conversation
No free trial or freemium tier is offered
Aimed at organizations with complex compensation needs, which may be more than small teams require

faqs.question: What does CaptivateIQ do?
faqs.answer: It automates sales commission calculations, incentive compensation management, and sales planning for finance and revenue operations teams.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: The website does not advertise a free trial or freemium plan; pricing is custom based on payees, complexity, and integrations.

faqs.question: What systems does CaptivateIQ integrate with?
faqs.answer: It connects with CRM, ERP, and HCM systems such as Salesforce, HubSpot, NetSuite, and Workday via APIs and data imports.

faqs.question: Who uses CaptivateIQ?
faqs.answer: Compensation professionals, finance and accounting teams, and sales/revenue operations at enterprise and mid-market companies.

use_cases.title: Automating commission calculations
use_cases.description: Replace spreadsheet-based commission processes with an auditable, real-time calculation engine.

use_cases.title: Sales capacity and territory planning
use_cases.description: Set quotas and manage territories alongside compensation plans in one platform.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is CaptivateIQ?
paragraphs: CaptivateIQ is a sales performance management platform that automates commission calculations, sales planning, and incentive compensation administration. It is built to handle complex compensation plans, quota setting, and territory management without requiring heavy IT involvement.

The platform includes a no-code workbook builder, real-time calculation engine, and predictive modeling tools, and it connects to CRM, ERP, and HCM systems to pull the data needed for commission runs.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who CaptivateIQ is for
paragraphs: CaptivateIQ is aimed at compensation, finance, and revenue operations teams at enterprise and mid-market organizations managing complex or high-volume commission structures.

faqs.question: What does Everstage do?
faqs.answer: It automates sales commission tracking, incentive planning, and quote generation for revenue operations and finance teams.

faqs.question: Does Everstage offer live commission forecasting?
faqs.answer: Yes, its Crystal Commissions feature gives reps pipeline-based forecasts of expected commissions.

faqs.question: Is Everstage rated well by users?
faqs.answer: It holds a 4.8/5 rating on G2 and 4.7/5 on Gartner based on more than 2,500 reviews.

faqs.question: Is there public pricing for Everstage?
faqs.answer: No, pricing is custom and available on request.

use_cases.title: Commission forecasting for reps

use_cases.title: Self-serve compensation plan management
use_cases.description: Let RevOps and compensation teams build and adjust plans without engineering support.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Everstage?
paragraphs: Everstage is a sales compensation platform that automates commission tracking, planning, and quoting for sales organizations. It combines an incentives module, a territory and quota planning module, and CPQ into one system.
Its Crystal Commissions feature gives reps live, pipeline-based forecasts of their earnings, and a self-serve, drag-and-drop plan builder lets non-technical teams manage compensation logic directly.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Everstage is for
paragraphs: Everstage is built for RevOps, sales compensation, finance, and HR teams at companies including SaaS, telecommunications, manufacturing, and medical device businesses.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Forma.ai?
paragraphs: Forma.ai is an AI-powered sales performance management platform that unifies incentive compensation, territory planning, quota setting, and sales analytics in one system. It is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.

Its product suite includes Forma Operator for incentive compensation management, Forma Architect for territory and quota planning, and Forma Prophet for machine learning-backed sales planning advisory, connected through more than 600 pre-built integrations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Forma.ai is for
paragraphs: Forma.ai targets sales compensation professionals, RevOps leaders, sales leadership, and finance and HR teams at enterprise organizations with complex sales structures.

faqs.question: What does Performio do?
faqs.answer: It is a sales commission and incentive compensation management platform that calculates complex commission plans and provides real-time payout visibility.

faqs.question: Who is Performio built for?
faqs.answer: Organizations with 70 or more commissionable employees running complex commission plans, across industries like manufacturing, MedTech, and SaaS.

faqs.question: Does Performio need IT support to change plans?
faqs.answer: No, its no-code plan builder lets teams update compensation plans without IT involvement.

faqs.question: Is Performio pricing public?

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Performio?
paragraphs: Performio is a sales commission and incentive compensation management platform that calculates complex commission plans and provides real-time visibility into payouts. It is designed for organizations with 70 or more commissionable employees.
The platform includes a no-code plan builder, an Analytics Studio for reporting, embedded AI capabilities, and integrations with CRM, ERP, HRIS, and finance systems.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Performio is for
paragraphs: Performio serves enterprise and mid-market companies with large sales teams and complex commission structures, across industries such as manufacturing, MedTech, transportation, banking, insurance, SaaS, and telecommunications.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Xactly Incent?
paragraphs: Xactly Incent is an incentive compensation management platform that automates the design, calculation, and administration of sales commissions and bonuses, replacing manual spreadsheet-based processes.

It includes a Compensation Configurator for building complex plans, AI anomaly detection to catch payout errors before payroll, and compliance automation for standards like ASC 606 and IFRS 15, alongside native mobile apps for reps.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Xactly Incent is for
paragraphs: Xactly Incent is built for compensation administrators, sales managers, HR, finance, and RevOps teams at enterprise organizations managing complex commission structures.

faqs.question: What does Sales Cookie do?
faqs.answer: It is a cloud-based platform that automates sales commission calculations, replacing manual spreadsheets with real-time, transparent payout tracking.

faqs.question: Does Sales Cookie offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers a free trial with instant access and no credit card required.

faqs.question: What integrations does Sales Cookie support?
faqs.answer: It integrates with systems including Salesforce, HubSpot, NetSuite, QuickBooks, Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Power BI, Tableau, and Zapier.

faqs.question: Where is Sales Cookie based?
faqs.answer: The company is based in Spokane, Washington, USA.

use_cases.title: SMB commission automation
use_cases.description: Replace spreadsheet-based commission tracking with an automated, transparent system.

use_cases.title: Multi-currency commission calculation
use_cases.description: Calculate and track commissions for global sales teams across currencies.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Sales Cookie?
paragraphs: Sales Cookie is a cloud-based SaaS platform that automates sales commission management and calculation, replacing manual spreadsheets with automated calculations and real-time transparency for reps.

It supports claw-backs, true-ups, manager override plans, double-payment detection, and multi-currency calculations, and connects with CRM, accounting, and BI tools such as Salesforce, HubSpot, NetSuite, and QuickBooks.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Sales Cookie is for
paragraphs: Sales Cookie is aimed at small to medium-sized businesses with sales teams that need automated commission management, whether their compensation structures are simple or complex.

faqs.question: What does Plecto do?
faqs.answer: It is a KPI dashboard platform that centralizes data from multiple sources into real-time dashboards, with gamification features to motivate sales and service teams.

faqs.question: How much does Plecto cost?
faqs.answer: The Medium plan starts at $300/month billed yearly for 10 tracked licenses, and the Large plan starts at $465/month billed yearly for 10 licenses; Enterprise pricing is custom.

faqs.question: Does Plecto offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, Plecto offers a 14-day free trial.

faqs.question: Where is Plecto based?
faqs.answer: Plecto is headquartered in Denmark and is GDPR compliant.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Plecto?
paragraphs: Plecto is a dashboard platform that enables sales and customer service teams to monitor KPI data in real time. It centralizes data from multiple sources and visualizes metrics on dashboards and TV displays.

The platform incorporates gamification elements such as contests, achievements, and a reward store to boost team motivation, alongside coaching tools and more than 150 integrations with CRM, helpdesk, and telephony systems.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Plecto is for
paragraphs: Plecto is used by sales teams, customer service representatives, and contact centers across industries including telecom, insurance, retail, eCommerce, real estate, energy, and SaaS.

faqs.question: What does Ambition do?
faqs.answer: It is a performance orchestration platform that operationalizes sales execution and coaching using real-time leaderboards and automated coaching workflows.

faqs.question: How much does Ambition cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing starts at $45/user/month for the Starter tier, $65/user/month for Pro, and $75/user/month for Enterprise, with optional AI Insights and AI Actions add-ons.

faqs.question: What is Ambition's contract term?
faqs.answer: Contracts are structured annually, with a two-year term as the standard.

faqs.question: Does Ambition integrate with Salesforce?
faqs.answer: Yes, Salesforce integration is included across all pricing tiers.

use_cases.title: Sales coaching orchestration
use_cases.description: Automate coaching cadences and structured 1:1 meetings with centralized documentation.

use_cases.title: Performance visibility and gamification

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Ambition?
paragraphs: Ambition is a performance orchestration platform designed to operationalize sales execution and coaching across revenue teams. It unifies strategy and activity data to deliver actionable insights and automate coaching workflows.
The platform is offered in three tiers -- Starter, Pro, and Enterprise -- priced per user per month, with optional AI Insights and AI Actions add-ons and standard two-year annual contracts.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Ambition is for
paragraphs: Ambition targets sales leadership, CROs, sales enablement professionals, revenue operations teams, and inside sales and sales development teams at enterprise organizations.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is SalesScreen?
paragraphs: SalesScreen is a sales gamification and performance management platform that combines AI-driven insights with motivational game mechanics to drive consistent sales team performance.

Its Scout AI feature scans activity data such as calls, meetings, and pipeline movement to identify risk and momentum before it shows up in revenue numbers, while agentic gamification suggests competitions, missions, and rewards tailored to specific behaviors.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who SalesScreen is for
paragraphs: SalesScreen is used by sales managers and frontline sales teams across industries including insurance, financial services, real estate, software, recruitment, and call centers.
